reviews.review_description: I loved the challenges and made my iq go up
This is my first time seeing a game with 0% 1 star reviews. Internet, let's keep it that way.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We hope it will stay the same :)

reviews.review_description: Really good game but very short I hope it gets more levels soon
There's when I open the menu the game glues to my head but good game

An interesting puzzle game with some good ideas, but not all levels are logical or to solve without hint. And its too short. I played all levels in about 30 min. More levels please.

UPDATE: from 4 to 2 stars. New puzzles coming soon write the developer in july 2023. Over a year later nothing happens!!

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for playing IYAND. Game is getting a bigger update - ~30 more levels, high quality arts, better interactions and better progression. You can expect an update by end of this year at no extra cost for existing players.

reviews.review_description:
I am stuck on a level but this game is possibly one of the best mixed reality puzzle games that exist. Will definitely be showing my family and friends (and asking for their help! 😅). Will be a great demo for the Quest 3 for VR newbies.

Only suggestion is that the name is just "If You Are Not Dumb" because in order to pull up the game in the store I had to type (but actually copy/paste) the ridiculously long name "If You Are Not Dumb - funny & quirky puzzles to make you feel dumb" just so that I could write this review. It's a great game though so it deserved this extra bit of effort 😁

developer_response.body:
Happy to know that you loved the game :) I hope you will complete all levels and prove that you are not a dumb 😵‍💫😅
Thanks for the review :)

reviews.review_description: oh my days my iq went from 33 to 99999 after playing this game!!!!!!🤓🤓🤓

So I thought I'd give this game a go and wow, it's pretty good.   The puzzle mechanics are done really well and do work.  

The puzzles are fiendish, but some of them you will kick yourself when you finally get them.   So use the functionality of the headset in genius ways. 

But some are very very hard....    or maybe I'm not as smart as I would like. 

Pros:
Easy to pick up
Clear graphics
Hints available

Cons:
Some puzzles so hard it made me want to cry

On the fence:
Microtransations more Hints.   I'm not marking this down for this as the developer is trying to make this work, but maybe if there was a say of earning more..  i.e. for every 5 you do on your own you get another?

But impressive first impressions.   Keep up the good work.
Dev is da goat he help me make iq haigher with this game
